# GFM safety fixture

Paragraph with **strong**, _emphasis_, ~~strikethrough~~, `inline code`, and [a link](https://example.com).

> A quoted paragraph.

- unordered item
- [x] completed task
- [ ] incomplete task

1. ordered item
2. another item
